programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: An armored car driver is forced to collect money for a band of robbers who are holding his pregnant wife hostage Starsky and Hutch have only a few hours to locate his wife and rescue the driver as this gangs mo is to leave no witnesses alive

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: With the crew earning some down time and Airwolf some much-needed repair time Dom takes a trip to help out an old war buddy But he soon finds himself in the middle of both a family feud and a dangerous drug-smuggling ringwithout the help of Airwolf!

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Using a cursed pen a pulp writer transforms himself into an acclaimed novelist who is known for getting inside the minds of serial killers

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: When Froy is seriously injured on a routine repo the building confrontation between Lou and Matt continues to escalate

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lous new business relationship with Matt starts to unravel when a botched job puts a serious strain on the company

programme.title: The Last Command
programme.desc: In this fact-based film legendary Texan Jim Bowie Sterling Hayden attempts to come to a nonviolent compromise with Mexican President Santa Anna J Carrol Naish but the negotiations soon turn sour Consuelo de Quesada Anna Maria Alberghetti a Mexican girl with close ties to Jim then warns him that Santa Anas men are planning to invade So Jim Davy Crockett Arthur Hunnicutt and a tiny crew of courageous Texans hide out in an abandoned mission awaiting the violent confrontation

programme.title: Man of the Frontier
programme.desc: At the end of an exhausting cattle drive Gene Autry Gene Autry and his faithful sidekick Frog Millhouse Smiley Burnette leave their herd at a train depot where they meet the lovely Mary Baxter Frances Grant and her engineer father George Sam Flint Impressed by their toughness the Baxters recruit Autry and Millhouse to patrol the unsecured construction site of an important dam-building project plagued by accidents of a deadly and mysterious natureAt the end of an exhausting cattle drive Gene Autry Gene Autry and his faithful sidekick Frog Millhouse Smiley Burnette leave their herd at a train depot where they meet the lovely Mary Baxter Frances Grant and her engineer father George Sam Flint Impressed by their toughness the Baxters recruit Autry and Millhouse to patrol the unsecured construction site of an important dam-building project plagued by accidents of a deadly and mysterious nature

programme.title: Distant Drums
programme.desc: Distant Drums

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur and Carol head out to Pine Lake Lodge for a little rest and relaxation leaving Ed at home

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur gives away Ed to a prospective client in order to secure a home architecture job

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Although his son has been seriously hurt in an accident one of Lucas neighboring ranchers refuses to let him have medical assistance and because of that the boy may well die

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When North Forks lovely schoolteacher attempts to organize a womens suffrage movement the towns less progressive element decides to run her out of town

programme.title: Gunsmoke S05E08 Saludos
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S05E08 Saludos

programme.title: Gunsmoke S04E05 Letter of the Law
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S04E05 Letter of the Law

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Joe is accused of murdering a girl Her father and brothers want to hang Joe and the Cartwrights race to prove his innocence

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agent James West is protecting a shipment of gold en route to an Arizona town when he sees a flaming light in the sky and hears a loud crash West and the townspeople discover that a spaceship has landed and they witness three green-skinned women coming out of the ship The women state that they come from Venus and want to trade the precious gems on their clothing for gold which will be used as fuel for their spaceships return trip Artemus Gordon posing as an expert jeweler senses a scam as he examines one of the gems

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble is captured by Lt Gerard while traveling with a group of migrant workers During a violent wind storm Gerard is badly injured and Kimble has to convince the others to help him save Gerards life

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike Nelson learns of a derelict mine which has drifted into a California harbor

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike Nelson is called in by the Florida State Police to help solve a series of underwater crimes

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A stressed out bank employee begins having premonitions concerning a serial killer who could be any one of the men in her life

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Sweet singer Miranda and her musician partner Sean are a couple of struggling songwriters who are trying desperately to break into the rock music business Miranda creates a sexy new image for herself in order to achieve the fame and success she desires However Miranda winds up paying an extremely heavy spiritual price because of said sexy image

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Knight 309
programme.desc: Knight 309

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki Ryan and Jack travel to a small town where the disappearance of several children is linked to a mysterious toy playhouse

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A photographer whos anxious to get her career back on track gets some unexpected help on her latest photo shoots from Freddy whos terrorizing her models Meanwhile three FBI agents come to Springwood to investigate a family homicide but Freddy has some surprises in store for them

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Lies not been easy for actress Helen Shes getting older and her dreams of hitting the big time are disappearing When she gets a chance to take part in a beauty contest shes determined to do ANYTHING to win

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Married couple Fred and Ermas restaurant has seen better days But things change once a stranger walks in with a rather unique steak recipe

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Now knowing that Max is a spy Max and his Army buddy go up against the KAOS agent know as the Maestro

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max ends up as a Fugitive after he is convicted of robbing a bank and killing a man On his way to the death house he sees the one-hand man and escapes to find him

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ Callie and Stacks help BJs old friend Steven Thomas Ulysses Nathaniel Travis complete the filming of his television pilot Buster Crabbe is outstanding as an aging stuntman with a secret

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The wives horn in on Wilbur and Rogers duck hunting trip

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Rogers brother-in-law is begging Wilbur to write a follow-up hit song to Pretty Little Filly He wants it to be a blues number so Wilbur does his best to get Ed in a depressed mood

programme.desc: Carter tries for the Officer Candidate School

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer tries to collect money for Carters birthday

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A bank robber comes to the island to hide from the authorities and holds the castaways prisoner while he waits for his boat after his cover is blown

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Pentagon is set to launch a new deadly missile that will destroy everything within 100 miles of its path and the island is ground zero

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The rest of the McCoys find themselves torn over what to do about musically-challenged Lukes determination to enter an amateur singing contest

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When Luke fears that he may be losing his hair Grandpa employs an unusual tactic to remind Luke that appearances arent as important as he thinks

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: George becomes a hero after rescuing the occupants of a car that crashed into a lake Dick wants to celebrate his heroism by having George as a guest on his television show but Michael insists on booking a young science-contest winner

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Larry Darryl and Darryl begin feudin with the Loudons after Dick reports their trouble-making pet goat to Animal Control The feud threatens to prevent Stephanie and Michaels vacation to the tropics

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan and The Skipper find a government briefcase with top-secret information in the lagoon and when Gilligan handcuffs himself to the briefcase he becomes afraid that the enemy will come to the island and kill him

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: A space shuttle accidentally drops a load of radio active dust which lands in a farmers field Mitch and Griff have to handle the work of cleaning up the strange matter when Ryan is infected by the stuff

programme.title: The Three Musketeers
programme.desc: DArtagnan and his Musketeer comrades thwart the plans of Cardinal Richelieu to usurp King Louis XIIIs power

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A Jaridian probe lands on Earth and begins sucking energy from the Comonality The Taelons use humans in a near-death state to keep their connection while Lili and Sandoval try to find out what is draining the energy

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens develop a new drug made from human brain tissue planning to use it to control human society

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A young loner who believes he is a vampire is accused of murdering his mothers boyfriend

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: After seemingly having no interest for so many episodes what happened to Jim Tressa is suddenly in Peru and sidetracked by a voice from her past on a radio

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: After destroying an asteroid on a collision course with the moon an even larger obstacle appears - an entire planet! On a recon mission John Koenig encounters an inhabitant who convinces him- on the basis of faith- that the moon and the planet must collide But no one else supports Koenigs stand

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Determined to win re-election as Hazzard County Administrator at any cost Boss uses every dirty trick he knows in his campaign against the beautiful Thelma Claire TC Rogers the daughter of Boss old political foe

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A small-time crook runs afoul of the police and the mob; guests Tom Bosley Sheree North Barry Atwater

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Briggs poses as an American tourist and subjects himself to a show trial in order to discredit a public prosecutor attempting to seize absolute power in his country

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon try to track down the driver who hit and run with a pedestrian

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives break up a gambling ring Friday is undercover

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A man comes forward and admits to having seen the one-armed man running from the house the night of Helen Kimbles murder This gives Richard Kimble hope of another trial which could clear his name Will this man be willing to testify; and will his testimony be enough

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: The once friendly annual rodeo between the Barkley and Morton ranches has become a nasty win-at-all-costs event An ex-slave super cowboy raises the stakes when he agrees to compete for the Barkleys

programme.desc: Cheyenne meets a sheriff he admires and a town he likes so he decides to stick around When he finds he has an agenda too that involves a pretty woman and some easy money he has second thoughts and a decision to make

programme.desc: An ancient crystal skull is stolen during an auction By looking through it Miles Mayhem learns Matt Trakkers identity as the leader of MASK and blackmails him into giving up the rest of his secrets and technology

programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out
